classes.reasoning: This document is explicitly labeled "CLINICAL STUDY PROTOCOL" at the top and contains the full protocol structure including objectives, patient eligibility, statistical analysis, background and rationale, and comprehensive study design details for protocol BIORCE-CAR-2024-007.

trial_title: A Phase III, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of BRC-883 (Cardanezumab) in Statin-Intolerant Patients with Heterozygous Familial Hypercholesterolaemia
intervention: BRC-883 (Cardanezumab) - Anti-PCSK9 monoclonal antibody, 150 mg/mL SC
summary: This is version 1.0 of the Clinical Study Protocol for BIORCE-CAR-2024-007, a Phase III randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial evaluating the efficacy and safety of BRC-883 (Cardanezumab), an anti-PCSK9 monoclonal antibody. The trial will enroll 360 statin-intolerant patients with heterozygous familial hypercholesterolaemia across Spain, Germany, Netherlands, and Poland, with the primary endpoint being percent change from baseline in LDL-C at Week 24.
